name: Auto Loader Stretcher
shortDescription: Wheeled ambulance-style stretcher with folding legs for loading a casualty into a vehicle.
longDescription: A wheeled stretcher with folding support legs, designed for ambulance-style loading — the legs collapse as the stretcher is pushed into a vehicle, letting one or two people move a casualty without lifting the full weight by hand.

images.alt: Auto Loader Stretcher supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
